full_text:
Zhao Yu (Yuanda) 趙昱 (元達)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhao Yu (趙昱), styledYuanda (元達), was born in Langye. Created a model government in Langye, he was later murdered by Ze Rong. Zhao Yu was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and Tao Qian. Zhao Yu lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
